items.name: S&B Superfine Ginger Paste
items.merchantDescription: S B is a Japanese food manufacturer focusing on spice and herb food products. This ginger paste is being processed specially so it has a extra-fine texture. This goes really well with stir-fried dishes.

items.name: S&B Superfine Garlic Paste
items.merchantDescription: S B is a Japanese food manufacturer focusing on spice and herb food products. This garlic paste is being processed specially so it has a extra-fine texture. This goes well with stir-fried dishes and pasta.
